// // This module implements a six-input OR-AND logic circuit. Output Y is LOW only when all inputs A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, and C2 are LOW.
module top_module(
    input  A1,
    input  A2,
    input  B1,
    input  B2,
    input  C1,
    input  C2,
    output Y
);assign Y = (A1 & A2) | (B1 & B2) | (C1 & C2);

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a six-input OR-AND logic circuit. Output Y is LOW only when all inputs A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, and C2 are LOW.
